description: Create a quilting fabric calculator with formulas that handle unit conversion, conditional logic for directional patterns, safety margins, and retail rounding. Save the file to /home/ga/Documents/fabric_calculator.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: Complete the quilting fabric calculator by adding formulas to calculate: (1) total square inches needed, (2) yards needed (accounting for directional vs non-directional fabrics), (3) 10% safety margin, and (4) purchase quantity rounded to 1/8 yard increments.
